case_title: MIGUEL ANGEL QUESADA VS. OLGA HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO JAN-29-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
